##NAMES=Nifontovite
##RRUFFID=R060685
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_[BO(OH)_2_]_6_·2H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Fuka mine, Okayama Prefecture, Japan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless prismatic crystal
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060685
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_3.00_[BO(OH)_2_]_6_·2H_2_O ; = darker phase. H_2_O assumed ideal from stoichiometry  B_2_O_3_ estimated by difference
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.1176 b: 13.4427 c: 9.5231 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 118.403 volume: 1477.12 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
